nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “Take heed for yourselves, and do not carry any load on the sabbath day or bring anything in through the gates of Jerusalem.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: Take care for the sake of your lives, and do not bear a burden on the Sabbath day or bring it in by the gates of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說：為了自己的性命，你們要謹慎，不可在安息日挑擔子，不可挑進耶路撒冷的城門。

ccb.text: 耶和华说，如果你们想保住性命，就要小心，不要在安息日带货物进耶路撒冷的城门，
